CVE-2025-62185.title: In Ankitects Anki before 25.02.5, a crafted shared deck can place ...
CVE-2025-62185.summary: In Ankitects Anki before 25.02.5, a crafted shared deck can place a YouTube downloader executable in the media folder, and this is executed for a YouTube link in the deck. The executable name could be youtube-dl.exe or yt-dlp.exe or yt-dlp_x86.exe.

CVE-2025-62186.title: Ankitects Anki before 25.02.5 allows a crafted shared deck on Win ...
CVE-2025-62186.summary: Ankitects Anki before 25.02.5 allows a crafted shared deck on Windows to execute arbitrary commands when playing audio because of URL scheme mishandling.

CVE-2025-62187.title: In Ankitects Anki before 25.02.6, crafted sound file references c ...
CVE-2025-62187.summary: In Ankitects Anki before 25.02.6, crafted sound file references could cause files to be written to arbitrary locations on Windows and Linux (media file pathnames are not necessarily relative to the media folder).
